title: galium apricum subvar. aristatum
intro: Galium apricum subvar. aristatum, also known as the aristate lesser trefoil, is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its purported anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include potential relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and wound healing. Herbal preparations of Galium apricum subvar. aristatum can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to aid in detoxification and support the immune system.
